strategic_priorities.description: Improve gross margin by 5 percentage points within 12 months
Accelerate grid-services revenue via utility partnerships and demand response
Deliver v3 hardware by Q2 next year
Strengthen data privacy and EU compliance
Build internal ML capability over 18 months; partner in the interim
Increase supply chain resilience and avoid single-source for critical components
Maintain differentiation through superior user experience and firmware reliability

risk_appetite.supply_chain: Avoid single points of failure; require dual-sourcing for manufacturing and critical components
risk_appetite.technology: Partner for non-differentiating capabilities; keep firmware security, product UX, and data models in-house
risk_appetite.finance: Avoid capex-heavy joint ventures unless required for EU market entry and co-funded

governance.decision_authority: IoT Sourcing Council chaired by VP Operations
governance.review_process: Quarterly reviews for critical partners; semi-annual for others; legal review mandated for DPAs and LTAs over $1M

constraints.data_residency: EU customer data must remain within EU
constraints.supplier_location_preference: Prefer nearshore (Mexico/EU) final assembly for resilience and tariffs

existing_partners.name: NimbusCloud
existing_partners.notes: 99.9% SLA; EU regions available; data egress fees elevate switching cost

existing_partners.name: GridSense Analytics
existing_partners.notes: We own data and model outputs; they own base models

existing_partners.name: ThermoSense Co.
existing_partners.notes: No volume commitment; lead time volatile

existing_partners.name: Midwest Energy Alliance
existing_partners.notes: Coverage in 6 states; expanding to 3 more

preferences.manufacturing: Two qualified CMs for each critical SKU; long-term contracts with price-down clauses
preferences.cloud: Prefer 24–36 month terms with exit/data portability clauses; EU data residency compliance
preferences.utilities: Strategic alliances preferred over transactional engagements; co-marketing welcomed
preferences.components: Avoid transactional buying for sensors; seek LTAs with two suppliers where feasible
